# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in FastDrop, please report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public issue.** Instead, email security concerns to the maintainer directly via GitHub private messaging or by opening a [private security advisory](https://github.com/Kerim-Sabic/lightning-p2p/security/advisories/new).

## Scope

- QUIC/TLS transport security (handled by iroh)
- Ticket/capability token leakage
- Local file access beyond intended scope
- Dependency vulnerabilities

## Response

We aim to acknowledge reports within 48 hours and provide a fix within 7 days for critical issues.
